notes: Response identifies multiple genuine risks and frames the problem well as more than a deployment exercise, but critically misses the NZ-specific regulatory context (FMA prescribed fairness methodology, CCCFA, MRM 2023 independent validation requirement), names no specific personas with role/cost context, provides no bounded MVP with explicit deferrals, and conflates generic jurisdictional risk (GDPR, EU AI Act, ECOA) with the actual constraint set — weakening precision across constraint, persona, and MVP dimensions.
